name: Fey Step
description: As a bonus action, you can magically teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest. When you reach 3rd level, your Fey Step gains an additional effect based on your chosen season (Autumn, Winter, Spring, or Summer). Autumn: after you use Fey Step, up to two creatures you can see within 10 feet must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute or until you or your companions deal damage to them. Winter: when you use Fey Step, one creature you can see within 5 feet must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of your next turn. Spring: when you use Fey Step, you can touch one willing creature within 5 feet, and that creature teleports instead of you to an unoccupied space you choose within 30 feet. Summer: after you use Fey Step, each creature you choose that you can see within 5 feet takes fire damage equal to your proficiency bonus.

mechanics.duration: until end of your next turn

mechanics.description: The chosen creature teleports instead of you to an unoccupied space you choose within 30 feet.
